name: Fairy Heritage
effect: Increase the production of all buildings by 0.075% per Farm, Inn and Blacksmith you own.

name: Elven Heritage
effect: Increase your chance to find Faction Coins by +5% and increase your click reward based on your chance to find Faction Coins. Also autoclicks once per second.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is your chance to find Faction Coins.

name: Angelic Heritage
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration by 10%.

name: Goblin Heritage
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on Gems owned.
formula: floor(7.5 * log10(1 + x))%, where x is Gems owned.

name: Undead Heritage
effect: Increase Offline production based on time spent in this Era.
formula: +(0.7 * x ^ 0.7), where x is time spent this Era.

name: Demonic Heritage
effect: Increase the production of all buildings by 0.3% per Hall of Legends you own.

name: Titan Heritage
effect: Increase Royal Exchange production bonus by an additional 15% each.

name: Druid Heritage
effect: Increase Maximum Mana by +1 every 15 buildings you own.

name: Faceless Heritage
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on the highest amount of buildings purchased in a single Era this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.25 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is your Buildings Owned (Max) stat.

name: Dwarven Heritage
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on Excavation depth.
formula: (2 * (x ^ 0.9))%, where x is Excavation depth.

name: Drow Heritage
effect: Increase the production of assistants based on Royal Exchanges purchased.
formula: (3 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is Royal Exchanges purchased.

name: Mercenary Badge
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on the highest amount of Coins gained in a single Era.
formula: floor(5 * log10(1 + x))%, where x is your Coins Gained (Max) stat.

name: Dragon Heritage
effect: Increase the production of assistants based on time spent as Dragon in this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.7 * x ^ 0.85)%, where x is time spent as Dragon this Reincarnation.

name: Archon Heritage
effect: Buildings, Assistants, Royal Exchanges, Spells cast and Clicks count more by 10%.

name: Djinn Heritage
effect: Increase the production of Unique Buildings based on Limited Wish activity time in this Reincarnation.
formula: (30 + 0.3 * x ^ 0.65)%, where x is Limited Wish activity time this Reincarnation.

name: Makers Heritage
effect: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on Tax Collection casts in this Era.
formula: (ln(1 + x) ^ 1.75)%, where x is Tax Collection casts this Era.

name: Advanced Fairy Heritage
requirement: Fairy Master Trophy, 1 hour Fairy Chanting activity time this Era.
effect: Gain assistants based on Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths owned.
formula:
+(2 * x ^ 0.8), where x is Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths owned.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Elven Heritage
requirement: Elven Master Trophy, 1 hour Moon Blessing activity time this Era.
effect: Multiplicatively increase Autoclick power based on Faction Coins found in this Era.
formula:
(0.2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 0.8)%, where x is Faction Coins found this Era.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Angelic Heritage
requirement: Angel Master Trophy, 1 hour God's Hand activity time this Era.
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on spells cast this Era.
formula:
+(5 * x ^ 0.25), where x is spells cast this Era.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Goblin Heritage
requirement: Goblin Master Trophy, 1 hour Goblin's Greed activity time this Era.
effect: Multiplicatively increase Tax Collection worth based on Gems owned.
formula:
(0.15 * ln(1 + x) ^ 0.95)%, where x is Gems owned.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Undead Heritage
requirement: Undead Master Trophy, 1 hour Night Time activity time this Era.
effect: Assistants count more based on time spent offline in this Reincarnation.
formula:
(0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is time spent offline this Reincarnation.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Demonic Heritage
requirement: Demon Master Trophy, 1 hour Hellfire Blast activity time this Era.
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on Trophies unlocked.
formula:
(0.25 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is Trophies unlocked.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Titan Heritage
requirement: Titan Master Trophy, 1 hour Lightning Strike activity time this Era.
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on Royal Exchanges purchased.
formula:
(0.85 * ln(1 + x) ^ 1.15)%, where x is Royal Exchanges purchased.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Druid Heritage
requirement: Druid Master Trophy, 1 hour Grand Balance activity time this Era.
effect: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on the sum of all spell durations.
formula:
(9 * x ^ 0.3)%, where x is the sum of all spell durations.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Faceless Heritage
requirement: Faceless Master Trophy, 1 hour Brainwave activity time this Era.
effect: Gain assistants based on Unique Buildings built.
formula:
+(2.25 * x ^ 0.8), where x is Unique Buildings built.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Dwarven Heritage
requirement: Dwarven Master Trophy, 1 hour Diamond Pickaxe activity time this Era.
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on Excavation depth and Excavation Resets made in this Reincarnation.
formula:
(0.025 * (x * (1 + y + z)) ^ 0.65)%, where x is Excavation depth and y & z are free and ruby Excavation Resets this Reincarnation.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Drow Heritage
requirement: Drow Master Trophy, 1 hour Combo Strike activity time this Era.
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on Offline production and time spent in this Era.
formula:
(0.2 * ln(1 + x) * y ^ 0.4)%, where x is Offline production and y is time spent this Era.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.

name: Advanced Dragon Heritage
requirement: Dragon Master Trophy, 1 hour Dragon's Breath activity time this Era.
effect: Increase triggered Tax Collections based on Artifacts found.
formula:
+(1 + 0.05 * ln(1 + x) ^ 1.15), where x is Artifacts found.
*(1 + 0.2 * L), where L is current Lineage level.
